name: run-analyze-optimize-skill
description: Router and compact subskills for research, planning, execution, review, and autonomous run-analyze-optimize convergence.

interface.shortDescription: Route design, execution, review, and goal loops.
interface.longDescription: A compact router plus three stage skills for command-driven debugging and artifact convergence. It combines Karpathy-style simplicity and surgical edits with Roundtable-style research, planning, independent review, and unattended goal convergence.
defaultPrompt: Research options or create an executable implementation plan.
Run tests, diagnose failures, and fix minimally.
Iterate a pipeline until artifacts verify.
Review plans or execution results with independent evidence reading.
